top_signals.title: Oil Shipments Through Hormuz Pick Up on Back End of Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz picked up on Friday after the United States and Iran signed a ceasefire deal, with Gulf producers preparing to raise exports despite concerns over conditions set by Tehran for using the vital waterway.Washington…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England backs down on strict stablecoin holding limits, sets $50 billion issuance cap
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

top_signals.title: Q2 2026 emerges as most-hacked quarter on record with 83 incidents
top_signals.summary: Crypto hackers stole $755 million across 83 cybersecurity incidents, as cross–chain bridges remained the most costly attack vector of the crypto industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Irish Consultancy Opens Its Doors for Offshore Wind, Subsea Markets
top_signals.summary: A new engineering design and commercial advisory company focused on offshore wind, subsea transmission and marine infrastructure projects has launched in Ireland under the name of Insight Marine, targeting growing demand for specialist support…
